steps.t: There should be some evidence near Ainhard's home that can confirm who the attackers were. You should find evidence of the attackers' identities.
Langhár has identified goblin tracks near Ainhard's home. You should investigate the goblin tracks.
While investigating the tracks outside Ainhard's home, you were ambushed by goblins! You should defeat the goblins.
Ainhard's Homestead lies south of Vegbár. in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Ainhard.
Ainhard's Homestead lies south of Vegbár. in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Ainhard.
